creator: alex.kovalenko@verizon.net
text:
lam 7.1.4 will compile with GCC 4.2 and without FORTRAN component. In addition
to the attached (trivial) patches to Makefile and distinfo, I had to remove
previous patches from the 'files' directory as they were getting rejected.

Fix: Update net/lam to 7.1.4 (patches attached)

Patch attached with submission follows:
